notes: Run 2026-06-26. Mechanics: Initials (5) + Before & After (5). Initials is a first-ever use — no prior wordplay pack has used this mechanic. Before & After last used in 2026-06-22. All 10 answers are fresh across every prior wordplay pack. Initials answers: Dmitri Mendeleev (D.M.), Black Market (B.M.), Turing Test (T.T.), Manifest Destiny (M.D.), Habeas Corpus (H.C.). B&A answers: Scaredy Cat Nap, Sum Total Eclipse of the Heart, Water Polo Shirt, Second Life is a Box of Chocolates, Rock Bottom Line. Reviewer-applied edits 2026-06-27: ini-01 reclued to Dmitri Mendeleev (D.M., $800); Cat Nap Time → Scaredy Cat Nap; Solar Power Plant → Sum Total Eclipse of the Heart ($1000); Milk Chocolate Box → Second Life is a Box of Chocolates ($800); Water Polo Shirt reclued; Habeas Corpus Latin gloss cut; Rock Bottom Line tightened. lock_value set on reviewer-dictated values (Mendeleev, Black Market, Manifest Destiny, Water Polo Shirt, Second Life, Sum Total) so the importer's wordplay difficulty calibration doesn't override them.

questions.constraint_text: These are a person's initials — who do they belong to?
